item.title: Nvidia
item.summary: News value Update timeline; public information only.

updates.event: Nvidia states the U.S. Department of Energy's next-generation government supercomputer will also use Blackwell chips, alongside the new NPS deployment.
updates.after_state: "Blackwell chips adopted by U.S. DOE next-gen supercomputer and by NPS"

evidence.source_quote: 美国能源部正在建设的新一代政府超级计算机也将采用英伟达 Blackwell 芯片

facts.statement: Nvidia states the U.S. Department of Energy's next-generation government supercomputer will also use Blackwell chips, alongside the new NPS deployment.
facts.value: Blackwell chips adopted by U.S. DOE next-gen supercomputer and by NPS

facts.statement: 英伟达2027财年第一季度（2026年2月至4月）营收达816亿美元，同比增长85%，GAAP毛利率达74.9%。

item.html:
Nvidia states the U.S. Department of Energy's next-generation government supercomputer will also use Blackwell chips, alongside the new NPS deployment.
